title: Allhaven Modpack
description: This modpack is based around the Conquest Refabricated mod, which we use in combination with other mods to create stunning builds on a community server!
body:
# 🌍 Explore Allhaven – A Conquest Reforged Community Server!

Welcome to Allhaven, the official modpack for our community server, which is hosted by the Allhaven Team:
- Druss Rua
- Kara
- LegendaryPorpoise
- Lendill

This modpack is designed to enhance your experience as you explore our evoling world and the different server projects that are connected here. If you enjoy building with the Conquest Reforged mod this is the place to be and to join our growing community. 

## Mods included in our pack:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

### Building:
- Conquest Reforged
- Conquest Hearthfire
- Conquest Architects
- Axiom
- Believe Mod
- Aquila
- Create

### Various performance mods including:
- Iris
- Sodium
- and others

</details>




## 🛠️ What do we offer?
- A place that connects multiple server projects including Elmorin from LegendaryPorpoise, the world from Druss Rua and Serenal from Lendill.
- A plot server on which you can build your dream builds with Conquest Reforged, create mod, custom NPCs, straw statues, and much more!
- Custom quests and story-driven exploration in finished parts of our worlds using Custom NPC. 
- Joining our building teams to build on the different projects. 
- A place to have fun!



## 🌐 Connect with us!
Join the Allhaven community on Discord. 



## 📜 Disclaimer:
All mods featured in this pack are either developed by Allhaven team members or sourced from respected third-party modders with proper attribution.
